prestazioni: Engine: Upgraded Ford 3.5L EcoBoost V6 (engine code: *GTDI-3.5L-24V-TT*) with a custom Hennessey-spec billet aluminum crankshaft (forged 4340 steel, 86mm stroke) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods (4340 steel, 156mm length) to handle 1,200+ HP on E85 fuel. Turbocharger upgrade to twin Precision Turbo & Engine PT6766CEA (67mm inducer, 76mm exducer) with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates and custom 4-inch V-band downpipes (304 stainless steel, ceramic-coated).

Fuel System: Full Motec M150 ECU with dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps (1,200 LPH each) and Injector Dynamics ID2600X injectors (2,600cc/min) for E85 compatibility. Custom billet fuel rails (6061-T6 aluminum) and -8AN ORB feed/return lines with Earl’s UltraPro Flex hoses and AN-12 drain lines for the crankcase.

Drivetrain: Reinforced Ford 10R80 10-speed automatic transmission with a Sonnax billet valve body, upgraded Raybestos Gen2 clutch packs, and a PML differential cover with integrated cooling fins. Custom 6x6 transfer case (Hennessey-designed, 4.10:1 final drive ratio) with a Quaife ATB helical LSD for the rear axles and ARB RD110 front/rear locking differentials. Heavy-duty 35-spline CV axles (RuffStuff Specialties) with cryo-treated CV joints.
estetica: Exterior: Full Rocket Bunny widebody kit (6x6-specific, carbon fiber fenders with 4-inch flares) paired with a custom 3D-printed aluminum front splitter (12-inch overhang, adjustable canards) and a carbon fiber rear diffuser (integrated tow hooks, 3-inch ground clearance). Paint: BASF Glasurit 90-Line custom matte military green with satin black accents and 3M Scotchlite reflective pinstriping (1/4-inch width).

Wheels/Tires: Forged HRE FF03 wheels (22x12 front, 22x14 rear, +44mm offset) with beadlock rings (Billet Specialties) wrapped in Nitto Trail Grappler M/T tires (37x13.50R22LT front, 42x15.50R22LT rear). Custom 6x6-specific wheel spacers (2-inch thick, 6061-T6 aluminum) with extended wheel studs (ARP 7/16-inch, 1.5-inch length).

Lighting/Aero: Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light bars (50-inch front bumper, 30-inch rear roof mount) with custom aluminum light guards (powder-coated satin black). Carbon fiber hood (Rocket Bunny, 5-inch scoop) with a custom aluminum heat extractor (3-inch tall, mesh-backed). Rear: Custom aluminum swing-out spare tire carrier (holds two 42-inch spares) with integrated RotopaX fuel/water cells (2x 5-gallon capacity).
